description_long: This sculpture depicts two intertwined human figures, one male and one female, engaged in a dramatic and intimate embrace. The male figure is positioned behind and above the female, his arm raised and his body partially enveloped by a rough, textured backdrop that suggests a natural rock or abstract form. The female figure is seated, her body arched backward, supported by the male and the sculpted base. The surface of the sculpture is predominantly rough and matte, with some smoother areas on the figures' bodies, highlighting anatomical details. The base is irregular and textured, giving the impression of being hewn from a single block of stone. The entire piece is monochromatic, with a white or light stone appearance.
description: A white stone-like sculpture of two intertwined human figures, one male and one female, set against a rough, abstract backdrop. The figures are detailed and dynamic, with a textured base.
description_view_0: The front view shows both figures clearly, with the male figure embracing the female from behind and above, and the rough backdrop rising to the right.
description_view_1: The left side view emphasizes the textured backdrop and the seated position of the female figure, with the male figure partially obscured.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the rough, vertical backdrop and the back of the male figure, with most anatomical details obscured.
description_view_3: The right side view provides a dynamic angle of the male figure's embrace and the female figure's arched posture, with the textured base visible.
attribute_subject_matter: two intertwined human figures in an embrace
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background and surroundings are not shown.
